transcript.content: Hi, I'd like to book a physiotherapy appointment for tomorrow afternoon please.

One moment, I'll check tomorrow afternoon's slots for you. Sorry, there are no available slots tomorrow afternoon at either branch. Would you like to try for the next available afternoon, or would a morning or evening slot work for you?
Oh, okay. Can you tell me the next available afternoon slot then?

Let me check the next available afternoon slot for you. The next available afternoon slots are on Monday, 20 July. You can book twelve noon at our Bannerghatta Road branch with Dr. Gopika Nair, or twelve noon or one o'clock at our Wilson Garden branch with Dr. Anamika Lyngdoh or Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi. Which slot would you prefer?
I’ll go with the twelve noon slot at the Wilson Garden branch with Dr. Anamika Lyngdoh, please.
Great choice. May I have your full name—first and last—for the booking?
Sure, it's Vikram Malhotra.
Thank you. I have written your name as Vikram Malhotra—is that correct?
Yes, that's correct.

Booking your slot now, one moment please. Your appointment is confirmed for Monday, 20 July at twelve noon with Dr. Anamika Lyngdoh at our Wilson Garden branch. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now. Thank you!
You're welcome, Vikram! We look forward to seeing you on Monday at Wilson Garden. Have a great day! Goodbye.

arguments.execution_message: One moment, I'll check tomorrow afternoon's slots for you.
Let me check the next available afternoon slot for you.
Booking your slot now, one moment please.

एक मिनट, मैं कल सुबह के slots देखती हूँ। कल सुबह के लिए कोई slot available नहीं है। क्या आप दोपहर या किसी और दिन देखना चाहेंगे?

शाम में कोई slot है तो वो बुक कर दीजिए।

ठीक है, तो Monday के लिए कोई slot है क्या?
एक मिनट, मैं Monday के slots देखती हूँ।
ठीक है, मैं इंतज़ार कर रही हूँ।

मेरा नाम सुनीता देशपांडे है।

एक पल, मैं आपकी booking कर रही हूँ। आपकी appointment confirm हो गई है—Monday, 20 July, सुबह साढ़े नौ बजे, Bannerghatta Road branch पर Dr. Gopika Nair के साथ। फीस चार सौ रुपये है। क्या आपको और कुछ पूछना है?
नहीं, धन्यवाद! मुझे बस यही जानकारी चाहिए थी।
धन्यवाद, सुनीता जी! आपको appointment के दिन clinic में देखेंगे। शुभकामनाएँ, नमस्ते!

Hi Kavita! You already have a confirmed appointment for your initial physiotherapy assessment with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi at our Arc branch in Wilson Garden — that's on Wednesday, twenty-second July at twelve noon.

Would you like to book another session, or do you want to change this existing appointment? Let me know how I can help!
Oh, I see. But can you please just book it again for the same time, just to be sure?

Your appointment for Wednesday, twenty-second July at twelve noon with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi at our Wilson Garden branch is already fully confirmed. There’s no need to book it again — you’re all set!

Is there anything else I can help you with?
Okay, thank you! That’s a relief. No, that’s all for now.
You’re most welcome, Kavita! If you need anything else, just give us a call. Take care and see you at your appointment. Goodbye!

transcript.content: Hello, I'd like to book an appointment this week.
Hello! May I know if the appointment is for Rahul Verma or Priya Verma?
Oh, it's for me, Priya Verma.
Thank you, Priya. Which branch would you prefer for your appointment—Bannerghatta Road (Medax) or Wilson Garden (Arc)? If you tell me where you live or work, I can suggest the closer branch.
I live near Bannerghatta Road, so that branch would be better for me.
Got it, Priya. Which day and time this week would work best for you at our Bannerghatta Road branch? Our clinic is open Monday to Saturday, nine in the morning to six thirty in the evening.
Any day this week is fine, and I’m flexible with the time too.

One moment, let me check the available slots for you. Priya, I have a few options at our Bannerghatta Road branch. Would you like Monday, twentieth July at ten fifteen in the morning with Dr. Gopika Nair, Monday at ten fifteen with Dr. Dilpreet Kaur, or Monday at twelve noon with Dr. Gopika Nair? Which one would you prefer?
I’ll go with Monday at ten fifteen with Dr. Gopika Nair, please.

Great, so that's Monday, twentieth July at ten fifteen in the morning with Dr. Gopika Nair at our Bannerghatta Road branch. I'll book this for you now—just a moment please. Your appointment is confirmed for Monday, twentieth July at ten fifteen in the morning with Dr. Gopika Nair at our Bannerghatta Road branch. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now. Thank you so much!
You’re welcome, Priya! We look forward to seeing you on Monday. Take care and have a great day! Goodbye!

transcript.content: Mere pair mein numbness ho raha hai — kya ye serious hai? Kisi human se baat karwa do please.
एक मिनट, मैं note कर रही हूँ। मैंने आपकी request note कर ली है। हमारी staff आपको इसी number पर जल्दी call करेगी — वो आपकी symptoms discuss करेंगी।
Lekin mujhe abhi kisi se baat karni hai, please. Yeh numbness kaafi ghabra raha hai mujhe.

मैं समझ सकती हूँ कि आप परेशान हैं। अभी मैं direct call connect नहीं कर सकती, लेकिन हमारी staff आपको जल्दी से जल्दी इसी number पर call करेगी। अगर numbness बढ़ रहा है या कोई और serious symptom है, तो कृपया तुरंत अपने नजदीकी hospital जाएँ।
Thik hai, lekin mujhe jaldi call chahiye. Yeh numbness theek nahi lag raha hai. Aap confirm kar sakte ho na ki koi call karega?
जी, बिल्कुल — आपकी request urgent mark कर दी है। हमारी staff आपको priority पर जल्दी call करेगी, इसी number पर। अगर हालत बिगड़ती है या बहुत discomfort हो, तो please तुरंत hospital जाएँ।
Okay, mujhe aapka assurance chahiye. Main wait karunga call ka. Thank you!
Thank you for your patience. हमारी staff आपको जल्दी call करेगी — आप बिल्कुल भरोसा रखिए। Take care, and if you need anything else, just let us know.

However, it re-asks the user's name after it has already been provided, which violates the consistency requirement. The conversation flow is maintained, and the chatbot continues to assist the user effectively, but the inconsistency with the name affects the overall adhere

transcript.content: Hi, this is Aditya Iyer — I want to book a physiotherapy session for tomorrow evening, around five or six.

One moment, let me check tomorrow evening's slots for you. Sorry, there are no available slots tomorrow evening at either branch. Would you like to try for the next available evening, or is another time tomorrow possible for you?
Oh, really? That's disappointing. Can you check for the next available evening then?

Let me check the next available evening slots for you. The next available evening slots are on Monday, 20th July at five o’clock. You can choose Medax branch on Bannerghatta Road with Dr. Pooja, Dr. Gopika, or Arc branch in Wilson Garden with Dr. Anamika. Which branch and doctor would you prefer?
Wait, am I talking to a robot? I just said my name is Aditya Iyer. Anyway, I’ll go with the Medax branch and Dr. Pooja at five o’clock on Monday.

Yes, I am Asha, the AI assistant for Arogya clinic. I’ll help you with your booking.

I have your name as Aditya Iyer. Is that correct? Should I go ahead and book Monday, 20th July, five o’clock at the Medax branch with Dr. Pooja?
Yes, that's correct! I already told you my name. Just go ahead and book it, please.

Booking your slot now, one moment please. Your appointment is confirmed: Monday, 20th July at five o’clock in the evening, Medax branch on Bannerghatta Road with Dr. Pooja. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?

arguments.execution_message: One moment, let me check tomorrow evening's slots for you.
Let me check the next available evening slots for you.
Booking your slot now, one moment please.

latency.caveat: Latency values are Retell-measured per-call percentiles aggregated across calls. Retell's e2e EXCLUDES the caller-side network leg: callers dialing from India over the US number (or WebRTC from India) experience roughly +250-350ms on top of these figures. ASR component latency is not separately exposed by the platform; it is included in e2e.
